ed83639b-1665-48b1-91f9-823388c1fb30:
SELECT c1.city, c1.name AS name1, c2.name AS name2
FROM customers c1
JOIN customers c2 ON c1.city = c2.city AND c1.id < c2.id
ORDER BY c1.city, name1;
39133b32-ac36-4ebf-b193-49241fb9a7c9:
WITH cte_sales AS (
    SELECT product_id, SUM(quantity) AS quantity_sold
    FROM order_items
    GROUP BY product_id
), cte_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(quantity_sold) AS avg_across_all
    FROM cte_sales
)
SELECT p.name AS product_name, cs.quantity_sold, ca.avg_across_all
FROM cte_sales cs
JOIN cte_avg ca ON TRUE
JOIN products p ON cs.product_id = p.id
ORDER BY cs.quantity_sold DESC;
8a804b7d-47ec-489f-ad24-b68f399103ff:
SELECT title, price
FROM books
ORDER BY price DESC
LIMIT 1;
f1c0b230-58c0-4dc9-ae91-b0c7db177c25:
SELECT s.name
FROM students s
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON s.id = e.student_id
INNER JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id
INNER JOIN professors p ON c.professor_id = p.id
WHERE p.name = 'Dr. Adams'
ORDER BY s.name;
50275fcf-50e1-4db3-9afc-417a697056cc:
SELECT 
    c.name AS customer_name, 
    o.order_date, 
    LAG(o.order_date) OVER (PARTITION BY c.id ORDER BY o.order_date) AS prev_order_date
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
ORDER BY 
    c.name, 
    o.order_date;
97423156-043d-466e-b431-c6d968559a55:
WITH book_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(price) AS avg_price
    FROM books
),
book_price_diff AS (
    SELECT 
        title, 
        price, 
        price - avg_price AS price_diff
    FROM 
        books, 
        book_avg
)
SELECT 
    title, 
    price, 
    ROUND(price_diff, 2) AS price_diff
FROM 
    book_price_diff
ORDER BY 
    price_diff DESC;
927060ab-1905-4c62-9151-05a51c71f51c:
SELECT c.name, COUNT(o.id) as order_count
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY order_count DESC;
8ea6876e-1017-449e-95a4-f6ae088cca97: SELECT name, salary FROM employees WHERE department = 'Engineering';
a058534d-8412-4ccb-b0bf-070524fe9bf0:
SELECT s.label AS size_label, c.name AS color_name
FROM sizes s
CROSS JOIN colors c
ORDER BY s.label, c.name;
